title: Segmentation fault following UNSUPPORTED error
body:
**Description:**

Thank you for maintaining this great software. I would like to report an issue where Verilator appears to crash after reporting an UNSUPPORTED error for a small SystemVerilog example.

**Minimal Reproducer (`small.sv`):**

```systemverilog
module top;
    typedef struct {
        logic bit_field;
    } status_t;

    status_t status_reg = '{bit_field: 1'b0} ^ 1'b0;
endmodule
```

**Command:**

```bash
verilator -cc small.sv -Mdir obj_dir -o Vrepro --prefix Vtop
```

**Observed Output (abridged):**

```
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: small.sv:6:27: Unsupported/Illegal: Assignment pattern member not underneath a supported construct: XOR
AddressSanitizer:DEADLYSIGNAL
ERROR: AddressSanitizer: SEGV on unknown address 0x000000000040
    #0 AstNodeDType::skipRefIterp(bool, bool, bool) const
    #1 WidthVisitor::checkCvtUS(...)
    ...
```


**Version:**

```
Verilator 5.045 devel
rev v5.044-50-g8b2144a9d
```

**OS:** Ubuntu 20.04


Please let me know if any additional information would be helpful.
